title: bupleurum dumosum
intro: Bupleurum dumosum, also known as the bushy bupleurum or shrubby hare's ear, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Apiaceae. It has been traditionally used in Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial activities. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating colds and flu, and supporting liver health. Bupleurum dumosum can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
